name: Bilbo
line: My dear Frodo.

name: Bilbo
line: You asked me one once if I had told you everything there was to know about my adventures. And while I can honestly say I have told you the truth, I may not have told you all of it.

name: Bilbo
line: I am old now, Frodo. I’m not the same Hobbit I once was.

name: Bilbo
line: I think it is time for you to know what really happened. It began long ago in a land far away to the east, the like of which you will not find in the world today.

name: Bilbo

line: Thror ruled with utter surety, never doubting his house would endure, for his line lay secure in the lives of his son and grandson. Ahhh, Frodo, Erebor; built deep within the mountain itself, the beauty of this fortress city was legend.

name: Bilbo

name: Bilbo
line: The young dwarf prince took work where he could find it, laboring in the villages of men, but always he remembered the mountain smoke beneath the moon, the trees like torches blazing bright, for he had seen dragon fire in the sky, and his city turned to ash, and never forgave, and he never forgot.

name: Bilbo
line: That, my dear Frodo, is where I come in. For quite by chance, and the will of a Wizard, fate decided I would become part of this tale. It began, well, it began as you might expect. In a hole in the ground, there lived a Hobbit. Not a nasty, dirty, wet hole, full of worms and oozy smells; this was a Hobbithole, and that means good food, a warm hearth, and all the comforts of home.

name: Bilbo
line: Thank you.

name: Bilbo

name: Bilbo

name: Frodo

name: Bilbo

name: Frodo

name: Frodo

name: Bilbo

name: Bilbo

name: Bilbo
line: Ahhh. He wouldn’t miss a chance to lit up his whizpoppers! He’ll give us quite a show, you’ll see.

name: Frodo
line: Alright then, I’m off.

name: Bilbo

name: Frodo
line: East Farthing woods. I’m going to surprise him.

name: Bilbo
line: Well, go on then! You don’t want to be late.

name: Bilbo
line: He doesn’t approve of being late. Not that I ever was. In those days, I was always on time. I was entirely respectable. And nothing unexpected ever happened.

name: Bilbo
line: Good morning.

name: Gandalf
line: What do you mean? Do you mean to wish me a good morning, or do you mean that it is a good morning whether I want it or not? Or, perhaps you mean to say that you feel good on this particular morning. Or are you simply stating that this is a morning to be good on?

name: Bilbo
line: All of them at once, I suppose.

name: Bilbo

name: Gandalf
line: That remains to be seen. I’m looking for someone to share in an adventure.

name: Bilbo
line: Gandalf...not Gandalf, the wandering Wizard, who made such excellent fireworks! Old Took used to have them on Midsummer’s Eve. Ha, ha! Well. Hmm, I had no idea you were still in business.

name: Bilbo

name: Gandalf
line: Well, I’m pleased to find your remember something about me, even if it’s only my fireworks. Well that’s decided. It will be very good for you, and most amusing for me. I shall inform the others.

name: Bilbo
line: Inform the who? What? No. No. No! Wait. We do not want any adventures here, thank you. Not today, notmm. I suggest you try over the Hill or across the Water. Good morning.
